metadata.title: Signal Bleed token/NPC placement manifest
metadata.note: Use as a GM planning guide. Roll20 scripts can create character sheets and handouts, but placing tokens automatically requires page IDs, token image URLs already in Roll20, and map-specific coordinates. For now, place tokens manually.

tokens.name: Dr. Sera Valez
tokens.starting_location: A5 Triage Desk or A10 Staff Office / Records
tokens.notes: Charismatic clinic leader. Pushes negotiation, evacuation, and containment.

tokens.name: Senior Nurse Imani Cho
tokens.starting_location: A3 Reception and Waiting Area or A5 Triage Desk
tokens.notes: Practical, tired, knows patient flow and which corridors must remain clear.

tokens.name: Orderly Pax Ruun
tokens.starting_location: A6 Emergency Intake Bay
tokens.notes: Saw that the courier did not arrive through official emergency intake.

tokens.name: Clinic Security Monitor
tokens.starting_location: A10 Staff Office / Records or a small security alcove
tokens.notes: Can help retrieve clinic camera footage if PCs earn trust. Possible pressure point for privacy conflicts.

tokens.name: Sister Luma
tokens.starting_location: A3 Waiting Area or B9 Counselor Offices
tokens.notes: Emotional/spiritual support. Good prompt for psychology/comfort interactions.

tokens.name: Mara “Mother Red” Vey
tokens.starting_location: A1 Indoor Street, A13 Service Corridor, or B4 Pantry
tokens.notes: Gang leader. Charismatic and negotiation-oriented if respected. Covertly funds aid/school support.

tokens.name: Nox “Bluewire” Kade
tokens.starting_location: A14 Bluewire’s Pacing Route near A6/A7/A13
tokens.notes: Obvious distress. Difficulty 8 to notice serious instability, 10 to identify likely opioid dependence/cyber-strain.

tokens.name: Redline Lookout Pair
tokens.starting_location: A1 Indoor Street or A13 Service Corridor
tokens.notes: Protective, not suicidal. Can be talked down with respect and concrete plans.

tokens.name: Redline Camera Sitter
tokens.starting_location: B10 Back Service Corridor or C9 Monitoring Office
tokens.notes: Has access to side-corridor and street feeds. May have additional allegiances.

tokens.name: Redline Supply Runner
tokens.starting_location: B4 Pantry / Aid Distribution or B10 Back Service Corridor
tokens.notes: Can reveal Mara’s good works accidentally if treated kindly.

tokens.name: Keet
tokens.starting_location: B6 Classroom or B7 Children’s Corner
tokens.notes: Saw the courier/signals. Can mention Auntie Red if trust is built.

tokens.name: Miri and Sol
tokens.starting_location: B7 Children’s Corner or A4 Pediatric Corner
tokens.notes: Use for overheard conversation: 'Auntie Red paid for breakfast again, but don’t say it loud.'

tokens.name: Worried Parent
tokens.starting_location: A3 Waiting Area or B3 Community Commons
tokens.notes: Can pressure PCs to think about evacuation and not only the relay.

tokens.name: Food Line Volunteers
tokens.starting_location: B4 Pantry / Aid Distribution
tokens.notes: Know that supplies arrive through suspicious but reliable routes.

tokens.name: Commander Ilan Rusk
tokens.starting_location: A1 Indoor Street edge, D3 Central Incident Hall, or remote comms first
tokens.notes: Can be negotiated with, bluffed, exposed, blackmailed, or temporarily allied against aliens.

tokens.name: Corp Recovery Pair
tokens.starting_location: A1 Public Concourse edge or C1 Service Street
tokens.notes: Disciplined posture. Nonlethal or lethal depending on escalation.

tokens.name: Corporate Drone
tokens.starting_location: A1 Public Concourse, C1 Service Street, or D1 Landing Corner
tokens.notes: Camera/speaker platform before it becomes a weapon.

tokens.name: Corporate Feed Handler
tokens.starting_location: Remote initially; D6 Control Room if present
tokens.notes: May be the additional allegiance inside a control room; could manipulate footage.

tokens.name: Florence “NightCrash” Vale
tokens.starting_location: D1 Landing Corner / Skywell Pad or post-finale A1/A3
tokens.notes: Emergency safety valve or recognition cameo. Nonlethal against humans, lethal against aliens.

tokens.name: The Siren Saint
tokens.starting_location: D1 Landing Corner / Skywell Pad
tokens.notes: Rapid-response bike with detachable trauma pod/micro-ambulance sled.

tokens.name: Gurney Angels
tokens.starting_location: D12 NightCrash Arrival Route or A6 Emergency Intake Bay
tokens.notes: Sponsored human medical tech, not alien drones.

tokens.name: Mote Swarm
tokens.starting_location: D8 Containment Chamber or D3 Central Incident Hall
tokens.notes: Forces cooperation and evacuation. Not a social faction.

tokens.name: Signal-Touched Patient
tokens.starting_location: A7 Trauma or D7 Patient Holding Rooms
tokens.notes: Medical/social scene before combat. Should prompt Medicine, Psychology, Cyberware, and Mesh checks.
